values: Replace only the warm and referral placeholders with people you know or people who have consented to an introduction. Never add journal content, medical information, diagnoses, or inferred mental-health traits.
They have previously discussed journaling or reflection without sharing sensitive details.
They already journal intermittently or have asked for prompts.
They work in a high-context role and use professional retrospectives.
Add warm contact — designer or creative peer
They use notes, prompts, or personal reflection in their creative process.
They have discussed needing a clearer end-of-day reflection routine.
They already use weekly reviews or founder reflection practices.
They share practical systems and can give product-language feedback.
Add warm contact — writer or freelancer
They use writing as a regular way to reflect on work and life.
They already use personal retrospectives and can assess a guided format.
They keep daily notes and may value a smaller reflection loop.
